rows.label: qev070303_MSG0001
rows.name:
...What is it.
No matter what you do, I won't cooperate with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0002
rows.name:
Gud, was it?
If you hate me that much, you should just kill me.
You #a+эx*c%...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell the Doctor you came to save him.

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0003
rows.name:
What... [ST:playername ]!
I see, Veven asked you to come![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0004
rows.name:
You really saved me!
Even I thought this was the end
this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, you're a pitiful one.
Because you can't create anything yourself,
you kidnap and sell off talented people like this.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0006
rows.name:
Doesn't living like that make you feel empty?
No matter how many people you sell to make money,
you will forever remain an #a+эx*c%.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0007
rows.name:
Wait... Hm?
You aren't Gud...
I feel like I've heard that voice somewhere?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0008
rows.name:
Could it be [ST:playername ]!
Yes... this wavelength must be it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0009
rows.name:
Why are you doing something so mischievous.
If you came to save me, hurry up and say so![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'll explain the details while we escape.
Anyway, go get the keycard
to disable this barrier![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0011
rows.name:
The keycard should be held by
a Marnuck around here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0012
rows.name:
...I'm counting on you.
Despite appearances, I am a busy CEO now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0013
rows.name:
I don't have time to idle away in a place like this.
I must hurry back to NLA
and mass-produce best-selling new products.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0014
rows.name:
...Hm? Have you forgotten?
A Marnuck around here
should have the keycard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev070303_MSG0015
rows.name:
Beat him down quickly and take it from him!
I'm counting on you, get me out of here fast.[ST:wait ]
